description: Amazon GuardDuty EKS Runtime Monitoring security agent now supports Amazon EKS workloads that use the Bottlerocket operating system, AWS Graviton processors, and AMD64 processors.

featureDetails.featureDescription: Amazon GuardDuty EKS Runtime Monitoring security agent now supports Amazon EKS workloads that use the Bottlerocket operating system, AWS Graviton processors, and AMD64 processors.
